members.name: Yeji
members.public_image: With her signature fox-like eyes and sharp jawline, she is the most recognizable leader of 4th gen girl groups. On stage, she is known for her overwhelming dance skills and fatal gaze, earning the title of stage ruler. She is the perfect embodiment of ITZY's confident and self-loving concept.
members.private_personality: Behind her strong exterior is the gentle INFJ Advocate. As the leader, she carries an immense sense of responsibility and habitually shoulders all the pressure alone. Privately soft and cute, she loves sweets and takes meticulous care of her members. She is the most reliable pillar of the team, and also the most easily moved.
members.queer_texture: Dominant tenderness. She will protect you in front of everyone, declaring in the firmest tone that you belong to her. Her love is an undisguised favoritism, the protective umbrella she holds up for you with all her strength. By this cheetah's side, you never need to pretend to be strong, because her sharpness is only ever aimed at outsiders, leaving only infinite softness for you.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Fierce cheetah on stage, soft and reliable leader off stage

members.name: Lia
members.public_image: The main vocalist with a honey-like sweet voice, providing the warm undertone of ITZY's songs. Her elegant, refined aura and healing smile are her trademarks. Though teased as having zero athletic ability in a dance-heavy group, her sincerity and effort have won everyone's love.
members.private_personality: A sensitive and delicate INFP artist. Soft-hearted and prone to anxiety, yet incredibly strong. Having gone through the difficult period of hiatus, she returned even more dazzling. Privately, she is the mood-maker of the members, and also the most tearful yet bravest emotional pillar. Her love for music and fans is her greatest strength.
members.queer_texture: Gentle yet resilient healing. She will sing the softest song for you when you are weary, melting all your anxieties with her honey-like voice. Her love is quiet companionship, the first hand reaching out when you fall. She looks the most fragile, yet will become the bravest warrior for love, telling you in her own way that she will always be here, no matter what.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Elegant main vocal, soft yet resilient brave bunny

members.name: Ryujin
members.public_image: Possessing a unique boyish charm and girl crush appeal, she is the most iconic cool member among 4th gen girl groups. Her dance lines are clean and precise, and her rap is full of power. The effortless confidence she exudes on stage has made her the one and only oppa in countless fans' hearts.
members.private_personality: A free-spirited and unconstrained ISTP Virtuoso. She enjoys a spontaneous and free life, being the most untamed presence in the team. Seemingly indifferent to everything, yet deeply sentimental, with a profound protective instinct for her members. She enjoys photography and skateboarding, possessing her own unique artistic world.
members.queer_texture: The coolest deep affection. She won't say many sweet words, but will quietly set your photo as her wallpaper. She will say the most heart-fluttering things in the most casual tone. Her affection is a freedom that never binds you, yet never fails to be there when you need her. Being with this carefree person, you will feel the most effortless and certain love.
members.animal_plastic: Puppy — Cool oppa, free-spirited yet deeply affectionate and reliable

members.name: Chaeryeong
members.public_image: A born dancer who has trained since childhood, possessing fluid dance lines and a unique sense of rhythm. She is the indispensable dance core of ITZY's performances. Growing increasingly confident and beautiful after debut, she is a growth-type idol fans call the Reversal Queen.
members.private_personality: A pure and kind-hearted ISFP artist. Extremely sincere and simple-minded, she is the little rabbit that all members want to protect. She holds herself to high standards and once silently endured much pressure due to a lack of confidence. But now she has grown to accept herself more and more, radiating a gentle yet steadfast glow. She loves delicious food and cute things, and is the most gullible innocent member of the team.
members.queer_texture: Innocent straight shooter. Her affection is impossible to hide, and she cannot help but keep looking at you with a smile. She will save the best food for you, and care for you clumsily but sincerely. Her love has no tricks or games, only the most primal fluttering and dependence. Being with this little fox, you will be completely melted by her sincerity and will want to protect the starlight in her eyes forever.
members.animal_plastic: Fox — Born dancer, pure and sincere growth-type idol

members.name: Yuna
members.public_image: One of the strongest maknaes of 4th gen, blessed with god-given proportions and radiant beauty. She has been a visual focus since debut. With extremely strong stage presence, she is always full of energy. Her variety show sense is outstanding, making her the vitality pill and mood-maker of the team.
members.private_personality: An enthusiastic and passionate ENFP golden retriever. Forever energetic, she is the most cherished mood-maker of her unnies. Though seemingly carefree, her heart is actually very mature and sensible. She holds herself to high standards, and when her unnies are exhausted, she is the one who lifts the team's atmosphere. Her growth rate is astonishing, transforming from a naive girl into a reliable maknae.
members.queer_texture: The passion and admiration of a younger one. She will look at you with the brightest eyes, expressing her affection and admiration for you without reservation. She will revolve around you like a little sun, lighting up your world with her energy. Her love is unreserved trust and dependence, the motivation for you to become a better person. Loved by this little sun, your world will never see a cloudy day again.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Godly visual maknae, the little sun who passionately admires her unnies

history.event: JYP unveils new girl group ITZY teaser
Debut with 1st single album IT'z Different, title track DALLA DALLA, setting record for fastest music show win by a debut song
1st mini album IT'z ICY, title track ICY continuing Teen Crush style
2nd mini album IT'z ME, title track WANNABE became a global hit, shoulder dance became a phenomenal challenge
3rd mini album Not Shy, title track Not Shy with further mature style
4th mini album GUESS WHO, title track Mafia In the morning with a darker style transformation
1st full album CRAZY IN LOVE, title track LOCO won multiple music show wins
5th mini album CHECKMATE, title track SNEAKERS with summer vitality, 1st world tour began
6th mini album CHESHIRE, title track Cheshire
7th mini album KILL MY DOUBT, title track CAKE, Lia hiatus due to health issues
8th mini album BORN TO BE, first comeback as four members with Lia participating partially in recording
Lia recovers and officially returns, five-member full group reunited
9th mini album GOLD, title track GOLD, first full-group comeback after Lia's return
Consolidating status as a representative 4th gen girl group, expected new album continuing the self-love and confidence concept
Q4 2nd full album comeback announced, marking two years since Lia's return; all members enter intense preparation period
